/usr/bin/c++ -W -Wall -pedantic -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-long-long -Wwrite-strings -Wpointer-arith -Woverloaded-virtual -Wno-variadic-macros -Wshadow -pipe -Qunused-arguments -DGL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION -stdlib=libc++ -std=c++11  -O2 -g -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/xeb2b.dir/xeb2b.cc.o CMakeFiles/xeb2b.dir/src/XeB2BDetectorConstruction.cc.o CMakeFiles/xeb2b.dir/src/XeB2BPrimaryGeneratorAction.cc.o CMakeFiles/xeb2b.dir/src/XeB2BPhysicsList.cc.o -o bin/xeb2b -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/geant4/geant4-v11.4.0-install/lib /usr/local/geant4/geant4-v11.4.0-install/lib/libG4Tree.dylib
